feat.name: Smile at Failure
feat.text: You know staying cool is key to prevailing in social situations, as anger leads to mistakes. When a creature you’re interacting with decreases its attitude from indifferent to unfriendly or from unfriendly to hostile, you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to any attempts to Make an Impression on the creature for the next hour. If this decrease in attitude leads to combat, you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to the subsequent initiative roll instead.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
